entities.name: V
entities.context: User who approves event recommendations from the digest

entities.name: Luma Event Digest
entities.context: Automated workflow that generates personalized event recommendations from Luma for NYC

entities.name: Luma
entities.context: Event platform (lu.ma) used as the source for event scraping

entities.name: luma_scraper.py
entities.context: Script that fetches latest events from Luma for a specified city and timeframe

entities.name: luma_scorer.py
entities.context: Script that ranks events by relevance criteria (AI, founders, networking, timing)

entities.name: luma_digest.py
entities.context: Script that presents top event recommendations with approval actions

entities.name: Booking Rules
entities.context: Constraints for event selection: max 3 per week, prefer 2-3 weeks out

relationships.context: V uses this tool to discover and approve events to attend
Digest sources all event data from the Luma platform
First step in workflow - fetches events from lu.ma/nyc
Second step - scores and ranks scraped events
Final step - presents top picks for approval
Scorer applies booking rules as filtering constraints
